name: Room & Board Metro Sofa
positives: Over 200 fabric options and multiple configurations
Cushions look new after a year
Maintains "as good as new" condition after 5 years
negatives: Approximately $2,000 price point
May be too firm and bouncy for some
Standard depth can feel shallow
2–3 month lead times for custom orders
positives_detail: The sofa handled multiple pets and kids with no signs of wear over extensive testing.
Offers customization with over 200 fabric choices, two lengths, cushion layouts, leg finishes, and sectional configurations.
The cushions still look new even after a year of everyday use.
Room & Board manufactures 90% of its furniture in the USA, ensuring high craftsmanship standards.
Offered in two seat depths—22 inches (standard) and 27 inches (deep)—to suit different lounging preferences.
Supportive, cloud-like cushions provide a comfortable seating experience.
Staffers report their Metro sofas look as good as the day they got them, even after five years of use.
negatives_detail: Custom orders can take two to three months for delivery when options are not in stock.
The sofa can feel too firm and bouncy for users who prefer a softer, sink-in feel.
The 88” Metro Sofa costs about $2,000 in standard performance fabric, making it pricier than many competitors.
The standard 22-inch seat depth may feel too shallow for taller users.

name: Interior Define Sloan Custom Sofa
positives: Bench seat option makes for comfortable sleeping
Can customize size, upholstery, fill, and other options
negatives: Seat cushion shifts
50% return fee on custom items
$299 delivery fee
positives_detail: Includes a bench seat option that doubles as a comfortable sleeping surface for guests.
Provides free fabric swatches so you can preview colors and textures before ordering.
Delivers incredible comfort and durability, maintaining structure over months of daily use.
Offers customizable size, upholstery, fill, and other options to fit your space and style.
negatives_detail: Seat cushions have been reported to shift position during regular use.
White-glove delivery service carries a $299 flat fee.
Custom items incur a 50% return processing fee of 50%.

name: Sabai The Elevate 86" Sofa
positives: Offered in three lengths: 70, 86, and 96 inches
negatives: Firm armrests uncomfortable for headrest
Only three style configurations available
Only one showroom in Brooklyn; limited in-person trials
Low 16-inch seat height
positives_detail: Comes in three lengths—70, 86, and 96 inches—providing sizing flexibility.
Arrives in five boxes with intuitive instructions, making assembly almost enjoyable.
Designed for repairability with available extra parts and a buy-back program to reduce waste.
Single-seat cushion design on the 86-inch version allows three people to sit without awkward gaps.
Seat cushion tested as one of the firmest of all sofas, yet still provided enough give for comfort.
negatives_detail: With a 16-inch seat height, some testers found the sofa sits too low to the ground.
Only one showroom in Brooklyn, New York, making it hard for most customers to try in person.
Only three sofa styles are offered, limiting customization for different aesthetics.
Armrests are very firm and not comfortable to rest your head on when lying down.

name: Albany Park Barton Sofa
recommendations: Best Sofa for Just About Anybody
positives: Deep and long enough for our 6'4" reviewer
Seats are comfortable and don't need frequent adjusting
negatives: Leather can be chilly
Arms need throw pillows to be comfortable
positives_detail: The wide arms are stable enough to hold a coffee cup while watching TV.
At 6'4", the Barton Sofa is deep and long enough to comfortably cuddle without curling up.
The plush foam seats are soft, supportive, and don't need readjusting over time.
negatives_detail: The rigid arms may require additional throw pillows for comfortable head or arm support.
The vegan leather surface can feel cold to the touch in winter when first sitting down.

name: IKEA Uppland Sofa
negatives: Polyurethane foam cushions less long-lasting
positives_detail: Springy, resilient cushions offered comfort immediately with minimal break-in.
The slipcover is removable and machine washable for easy cleaning.
The design feels supportive and comfortable whether sitting, lounging, or napping.
negatives_detail: The polyurethane foam cushions are less durable compared to higher-grade foam options.

name: IKEA Kivik Sofa
positives: Nearly 90-inch length with generous seat size
negatives: Wrinkles quickly; needs frequent fluffing
Not as durable as higher-end sofas
Frame joint broke after three years
Manufacturing changes may affect quality
positives_detail: Available for as low as $750 to $900, making it the most affordable decent couch tested.
The tested model measured almost 90 inches in length, offering ample seating space.
All covers are removable and machine-washable, aiding in easy maintenance.
Offers a generous return policy with 365-day returns on unopened and 180-day on opened products.
negatives_detail: Quality inconsistencies have been reported over time, suggesting checking recent user reviews before purchase.
Comparatively lower build quality results in less longevity than more expensive options.
Prone to looking wrinkled after few hours of use, necessitating regular cushion fluffing.
One tester’s Kivik experienced a structural joint break after three years of heavy use.

name: Burrow Range 3-Piece Sofa
positives: Durable performance fabrics hold up over years
21" seat depth suitable for upright seating
negatives: Up to 20% return fee without original packaging
Seat too shallow for comfortable lounging
No in-room or white-glove assembly offering
Assembly tedious and error-prone
positives_detail: Its small dimensions make it well-suited for apartments and small living areas.
Modular construction enables multiple configuration options, such as chaise, bench, or toddler bed setups.
Features a 21-inch seat depth and firm cushions, making it suitable for upright seating in small spaces.
Available in six performance fabric options, which remain durable even after years of use with pets and kids.
negatives_detail: Returns incur a 20% fee if original packaging is not retained, capped at $250.
Burrow does not offer in-room or white-glove assembly services for its sofas.
The 21-inch seat depth may feel too shallow for relaxed lounging or napping sessions.
Assembly is time-consuming and frustrating, often requiring multiple reattachments and additional help.

name: Article Ceni 83" Sofa
positives: Fabric rated up to 50,000 double rubs
23" seat depth balances lounginess and support
Fast dispatch often within a few days
Sturdy frame made of rubberwood, pine, and plywood
negatives: Only one showroom in Vancouver; limited in-person access
Inconsistent customer service for cushion replacement
No leather or velvet upholstery options
Low 16" seat height may not suit all
positives_detail: With a 23-inch seat depth, the sofa feels generous for most people without being too deep to get up easily.
Article typically dispatches the Ceni within a few days, streamlining the delivery process.
The woven polyester fabric has a rub count of up to 50,000, exceeding the 20,000-industry standard for durability.
The frame constructed from rubberwood, pine, and plywood offers solid build quality.
negatives_detail: Article has only one showroom in Vancouver, Canada, limiting customers’ ability to try it in person.
The Ceni sofa is only available in woven polyester, with no velvet or leather choices.
Some customers experienced delays or lack of follow-through with Article’s cushion replacement service.
At 16 inches, the seat height may feel too low for some users.

positives_detail: Manufactured in the United States, ensuring high local production standards.
Constructed with well-made, durable materials that stand up to daily use.
Offers more affordable pricing than competitors and includes free white-glove delivery.
Comes in performance velvet, performance basketweave, and leather upholstery options.
Available in 7', 8', or 9' widths and a sectional configuration.
negatives_detail: Made-to-order couches can require 10–12 weeks for delivery.
Returns must be initiated within seven days and incur a 15% restocking fee.
Offers fewer color options than competing brands.

name: Burrow Nomad Sofa

positives_detail: Each section includes a built-in USB charger for convenient device charging.

Upholstered in stain- and scratch-resistant olefin fabric for everyday durability.

name: Koala Bangalow Modular Sofa
positives: Shipped in boxes yet impressively large and sturdy
